summary: Inventory Variants and Platform Alignment testing complete. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all requested features: Inventory Variants page with CRUD, sidebar navigation with consolidated Inventory section, CRM Pipeline with List/Cards/Kanban views, Customers page with 4 filter dropdowns.

TestInventoryVariantsAPI.test_create_variant: PASS - Created with SKU, product_id, attributes

TestProductsAPI.test_list_products: PASS - Returns products for variant linking

admin_sidebar_navigation.inventory_section: PASS - INVENTORY section visible in sidebar
admin_sidebar_navigation.navigation_to_variants: PASS - Successfully navigated to variants page

inventory_variants_page.page_header: PASS - 'Product Variants (SKUs)' with product linking description
inventory_variants_page.stats_cards: PASS - Total Variants(11), Active(9), Low Stock(6), Total Stock Value(TZS 500,000)
inventory_variants_page.low_stock_alert: PASS - '6 variant(s) are below reorder level' alert displayed
inventory_variants_page.variants_table: PASS - Table with SKU, Product, Attributes, On Hand, Reserved, Available, Location, Unit Cost, Price, Actions
inventory_variants_page.product_filter: PASS - Filter by product dropdown present
inventory_variants_page.create_form_modal: PASS - Modal with Parent Product, SKU, Variant Attributes, Stock fields, Pricing, Location
inventory_variants_page.edit_delete_buttons: PASS - Edit/Delete action buttons in table rows

inventory_management_page.inventory_table: PASS - SKU, Product, Category, Qty, Reorder, Unit Cost columns

crm_pipeline_page.list_view: PASS - Table with Company, Contact, Industry, Source, Value, Status columns
crm_pipeline_page.cards_view: PASS - Lead cards with contact info, email, phone, industry, value
crm_pipeline_page.kanban_view: PASS - 7 columns (New, Contacted, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Won, Lost)
crm_pipeline_page.view_toggle: PASS - List/Cards/Kanban toggle buttons with data-testid
crm_pipeline_page.add_lead_button: PASS - Add Lead button opens form
crm_pipeline_page.stats_row: PASS - Shows Total, New, Contacted, Qualified, etc. counts with Pipeline Value

customers_page.table_view: PASS - Company, Contact, Industry, City, Payment Terms, Credit Limit, Actions columns
customers_page.cards_view: PASS - Customer cards with contact details and payment term badges
customers_page.view_toggle: PASS - Table/Cards toggle buttons with data-testid
customers_page.filter_dropdowns: PASS - 4 filters: All Industries, All Payment Terms, All Cities, All Types
customers_page.credit_filter: PASS - 'Credit Accounts Only' filter shows 'Showing 5 of 19 customers'
customers_page.stats_row: PASS - Total(19), Active(3), Credit Accounts(5), With TIN(2), Total Credit Limit(TZS 30,000,000)

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST- prefixed inventory variants created during backend testing (TEST-VAR-*, TEST-GET-*, TEST-UPD-*, TEST-DEL-*, TEST-DUP-*). These can be cleaned up via admin UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory Variants feature fully tested. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/admin/inventory-variants (list/create variants), GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/inventory-variants/{id} (CRUD). The /admin/inventory/variants page has full CRUD UI with product selection dropdown, SKU input, variant attributes (size/color/material), stock levels, pricing, warehouse location. Sidebar navigation shows INVENTORY section with 'Stock Items' and 'Product Variants' links. CRM Pipeline (List/Cards/Kanban views) and Customers (Table/Cards with 4 filters) pages verified working.
features_verified: Admin sidebar - INVENTORY section with Stock Items and Product Variants links - WORKING
Create new inventory variant with product selection, SKU, attributes, stock - WORKING
Low stock alert display on variants page - WORKING
Search and filter variants by SKU/product/location - WORKING
API authentication for admin tokens via konekt_admin_token - WORKING
CRM Pipeline with List/Cards/Kanban view toggle - WORKING
Customers page with Industry/Payment Term/City/Credit filters - WORKING
